meta.title: Amay Shah | Technical Product Manager
meta.description: Portfolio of Amay Shah — Technical Product Manager specializing in AI/ML products, Cloud FinOps, and Agile delivery.

hero.name: Amay Shah
hero.title: Technical Product Manager
hero.tagline: Dynamic Technical Product Manager and Technical Project Manager with a strong foundational background in Computer Science and advanced certifications including PMP, AWS AI Practitioner, and FinOps Practitioner/FOCUS Analyst. I possess extensive experience steering the end-to-end SDLC for cloud governance, machine learning, and AI-powered FinOps platforms—including cost recommendation engines, forecasting models, and conversational AI chatbots.
hero.tagline2: As a proven roadmap owner, I am adept at authoring detailed PRDs, managing backlogs, and leading cross-functional teams of 40+ engineers and data scientists across concurrent Agile, Scrum, and Kanban workstreams. I excel at managing CI/CD release schedules, orchestrating zero-downtime production deployments, and aligning engineering capacity with strategic business priorities to deliver scalable, data-driven solutions.

bullets: Own the product roadmap for AI/ML-powered FinOps products including cost recommendation engines, anomaly detection, forecasting models, and an AI chatbot, authoring PRDs and translating business needs into detailed user stories.
Lead sprint planning, backlog grooming, and retrospectives for 40+ engineers and QA across four concurrent teams, tracking story points and team velocity to optimize delivery cadence.
Coordinate release management and CI/CD pipeline schedules with engineering, shipping 4+ production releases per quarter with zero-downtime deployments.
Conduct competitive analysis and market research to inform feature prioritization and go-to-market strategy.
Execute rigorous UAT/production validation testing for AI/ML features, resulting in a 20% improvement in data integrity.
Conduct technical product demonstrations for multiple resellers, driving partner engagement and market readiness.
Led a cross-functional team through the full SDLC to automate weekly Netezza server refreshes, defining project scope and timelines using Kanban boards.
Managed risk and quality control with automated error-handling and standardized load-count tracking, reducing downtime by 25% and improving data integrity by 20%.
Led end-to-end SDLC delivery of a machine learning project for wood purchasing optimization, gathering stakeholder requirements and defining KPIs.
Managed backlog prioritization and sprint cadence using a hybrid Agile-Waterfall methodology, coordinating data scientists, analysts, sourcing, and sales teams.
Performed market analysis across multiple international markets, identifying pricing trends that reduced procurement costs and improved efficiency.
